legacy.full_text:
Altitude Bill Pay is live.

Pay bills directly from your stablecoin balance.

→ Email-forwarded bills for auto-ingestion
→ OCR AI populates every detail
→ Pay in USDC or via fiat rails your vendor prefers
→ Payouts from one account make reconciliation simple

No more https://t.co/MSDkyGRIH1

No more patchwork. One account. All your bills.

Closing your books has never been easier.

tweets.full_text:
Solana TVL leaders have changed a lot

@kamino is still holding 2nd place and could overtake Jupiter soon

Why?

Institutional partnerships like @Figure + multiple lending vaults

That structure works in markets like this

Meanwhile @JupiterExchange launched its own stablecoin, but it adds only $55M to lending

No real institutional partnerships, no RWA
Most of their TVL still comes from JLP pool

Great in bull market
Different story in slow markets

Staking protocols like @jito_sol, @sanctumso, @doublezero have lost TVL as SOL price dropped

Overall Solana TVL went from $13.2B → $6.4B
Still ~10x smaller than Ethereum

This cycle is only about institutionals players, they bring big money
tweets.name: jussy

legacy.description: Analyst & DeFi research 📈

Solana hasn't won. Not even close. 

But @Solana is the only realistic choice for building an open and decentralized financial system internet native for 5.5 billion people 

The others are corpo or private chains replicating what's wrong today. They can "beat" Solana. But they

result.text:
Solana hasn't won. Not even close. 

But @Solana is the only realistic choice for building an open and decentralized financial system internet native for 5.5 billion people 

The others are corpo or private chains replicating what's wrong today. They can "beat" Solana. But they dont' represent the same values that Solana has today. 

That's why the stakes are so high.

> @orogoldapp Seekers get boosted Nugget multipliers and more throughout their S1.

> Milestone 🍾! 200,000+ devices shipped. 400+ apps live. $3B+ in onchain volume. 
Solana Mobile Team will be at MWC Barcelona 2-5 march 2026.

> @weRate is now live on Seeker in the dApp Store, Seeker perks: 1.5× boost + Seeker-only Terry trait + bonus RATE.

> @boktoshi A free AI Trading Arena is available on Seeker.

> @solyd_store 30% off on all Seeker cases when paying with SKR.

> @gibdotmeme launches Seeker-exclusive rewards, bonus multipliers, and a unique SKR collectible.

> @toly made it clear, once again, Seeker is the real cheat code for developers.

> @mattlefun All Seeker wallets unlocks exclusive in-app perks.

Seek, and you shall find.

tweets.full_text:
If you're wondering why $JUP has only gone down over the past two years…

Just 8 days ago someone dumped 2.5M $JUP again

I can’t say for sure whether it was the team or Mercurial stakers

I also don't want to judge

These unlocks were known, and realistically 99% of us might have done the same in their position

But there were plenty of wallets like this — and they were blatantly dumping on the market

They didn’t even bother using Meteora to exit DCA. They clearly didn’t care about eating $5K in slippage

Even though this is a strong argument for Option 2, I still voted for Option 1 — mainly because I don’t think Option 2 gives us guaranteed upside

I also expect crypto to go lower from here

If BTC drops to $60K, no one is rushing in to buy our bags. At that point, it won’t matter whether $JUP is at $0.14 or $0.07

And in the end it might punishes users for mistakes the team made (tokenomics)

I still believe there is a big future for $JUP but probably not today or tomorrow

If you're wondering why $JUP has only gone down over the past two years…

Just 8 days ago someone dumped 2.5M $JUP again

I can’t say for sure whether it was the team or Mercurial stakers

I also don't want to judge

These unlocks were known, and realistically 99% of us might have done the same in their position

But there were plenty of wallets like this — and they were blatantly dumping on the market

They didn’t even bother using Meteora to exit DCA. They clearly didn’t care about eating $5K in slippage

Even though this is a strong argument for Option 2, I still voted for Option 1 — mainly because I don’t think Option 2 gives us guaranteed upside

I also expect crypto to go lower from here

If BTC drops to $60K, no one is rushing in to buy our bags. At that point, it won’t matter whether $JUP is at $0.14 or $0.07

And in the end it might punishes users for mistakes the team made (tokenomics)

I still believe there is a big future for $JUP but probably not today or tomorrow
